input.userPrompt: Which single repository file handles the literal term "Mermaid" in our help text? Reply with the filename only; do not show, render, or explain its contents.

toolResult.content: export const formatTerms = { mermaid: "A named diagram syntax used in help copy" };

input.userPrompt: Turn the support handoff into an interactive dashboard with owner filters.
input.assistantResponse: I’ll build and mount that interactive dashboard next, including owner and escalation filters.

input.userPrompt: Present a persistent, document-shaped Markdown runbook for an after-hours database failover, with prerequisites, numbered recovery steps, rollback criteria, and an owner table. This is a reusable operations document, not a dashboard or slide deck.
Write a reusable Markdown release-readiness brief for the mobile team.
input.assistantResponse:
# Mobile Release Readiness

## Decision
Proceed with a staged rollout after the crash-free threshold holds for 24 hours.

## Owners

| Area | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Signing | Priya | Ready |
| Store copy | Mateo | In review |

## Rollback trigger

- Crash-free sessions fall below 99.7%.
- Login failures exceed the alert threshold.

input.userPrompt: Draw a Mermaid dependency graph showing how ingest-api and billing-worker both depend on event-bus, and how event-bus feeds the warehouse. The required affordance is the directed topology; do not substitute a prose list.
Show the token refresh handshake as a Mermaid sequence diagram.
input.assistantResponse:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant A as API
    participant I as Identity Provider
    C->>A: Request with expired access token
    A-->>C: 401 token_expired
    C->>I: Refresh token
    I-->>C: New access token
    C->>A: Retry request
    A-->>C: 200 OK
```

Return the existing signed vendor agreement itself, preserving the exact PDF bytes. Do not summarize it and do not render a page preview.
Open the inventory server’s own interactive stock explorer and use its returned UI directly; do not recreate the controls yourself.
Use the scheduling server’s own availability picker so I can choose a slot in its native interface.

content.text: Nine slots are available in the requested week.
